nasb.text: For their property had become too great for them to live together, and the land where they sojourned could not sustain them because of their livestock.

esv.text: For their possessions were too great for them to dwell together. The land of their sojournings could not support them because of their livestock.

cnv.text: 因為他們都有很多財物，所以不能住在一起；又因他們牲畜很多的緣故，他們寄居的地方也容不下他們。

ccb.text: 以扫和雅各两家的财产和牲畜太多，那地方不够他们住，

csbs.text: 因为两人拥有的很多，不能住在一起；他们的牲畜众多，寄居之地容不下他们。
